testcase.name: participantRepository_FindByChatId_ShouldReturnAllParticipants

Found 3 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-06-23T19:46:22.318+03:00 INFO 21560 --- [ main] beddedDataSourceBeanFactoryPostProcessor : Replacing 'dataSource' DataSource bean with embedded version url='jdbc:h2:mem:2ff9a5da-81f2-4606-8dc8-ea65ce03660a;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=false', username='sa' 2026-06-23T19:46:24.113+03:00 INFO 21560 --- [ main] ORM core version 6.2.13.Final 2026-06-23T19:46:24.385+03:00 INFO 21560 --- [ main] org.hibernate.cfg.Environment : HHH000406: Using bytecode reflection optimizer 2026-06-23T19:46:25.528+03:00 INFO HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-23T19:46:28.768+03:00 INFO 21560 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists chat_participants cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists chats cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists messages cascade Hibernate: create table chat_participants ( joined_at timestamp(6), chat_id UUID not null, user_id UUID not null, role varchar(20) check (role in ('MEMBER','ADMIN')), primary key (chat_id, user_id) ) Hibernate: create table chats ( created_at timestamp(6), created_by UUID, id UUID not null, type varchar(20) not null check (type in ('DIALOG','GROUP')), name varchar(100), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table messages ( is_deleted boolean, sent_at timestamp(6), chat_id UUID, id UUID not null, sender_id UUID, content_hash varchar(64) not null, blockchain_tx_id varchar(255), encrypted_content varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists chat_participants add constraint FKn4feij8janlba38q59kl2ebgg foreign key (chat_id) references chats Hibernate: alter table if exists messages add constraint FK64w44ngcpqp99ptcb9werdfmb foreign key (chat_id) references chats 2026-06-23T19:46:28.950+03:00 INFO 21560 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-23T19:46:30.270+03:00 INFO 21560 --- [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-06-23T19:46:31.775+03:00 INFO 21560 testcase.name: messageRepository_FindByBlockchainTxIdIsNullAndChatId_ShouldReturnPendingMessages
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.chat_id, c1_0.user_id, c1_0.joined_at, c1_0.role from chat_participants c1_0 where ( c1_0.chat_id,c1_0.user_id ) in ((?,?)) Hibernate: insert into messages (blockchain_tx_id,chat_id,content_hash,encrypted_content,is_deleted,sender_id,sent_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into messages (blockchain_tx_id,chat_id,content_hash,encrypted_content,is_deleted,sender_id,sent_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select m1_0.id, m1_0.blockchain_tx_id, m1_0.chat_id, m1_0.content_hash, m1_0.encrypted_content, m1_0.is_deleted, m1_0.sender_id, m1_0.sent_at from messages m1_0 where m1_0.blockchain_tx_id is null and m1_0.chat_id=?

Hibernate: insert into messages (blockchain_tx_id,chat_id,content_hash,encrypted_content,is_deleted,sender_id,sent_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select m1_0.id, m1_0.blockchain_tx_id, m1_0.chat_id, m1_0.content_hash, m1_0.encrypted_content, m1_0.is_deleted, m1_0.sender_id, m1_0.sent_at from messages m1_0 where m1_0.chat_id=? order by m1_0.sent_at desc offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: chatRepository_FindChatsByUserId_ShouldReturnUserChats
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.chat_id, c1_0.user_id, c1_0.joined_at, c1_0.role from chat_participants c1_0 where ( c1_0.chat_id,c1_0.user_id ) in ((?,?)) Hibernate: select c1_0.chat_id, c1_0.user_id, c1_0.joined_at, c1_0.role from chat_participants c1_0 where ( c1_0.chat_id,c1_0.user_id ) in ((?,?)) Hibernate: select c1_0.chat_id, c1_0.user_id, c1_0.joined_at, c1_0.role from chat_participants c1_0 where ( c1_0.chat_id,c1_0.user_id ) in ((?,?)) Hibernate: insert into chats (created_at,created_by,name,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chat_participants (joined_at,role,chat_id,user_id) values (?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chat_participants (joined_at,role,chat_id,user_id) values (?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chat_participants (joined_at,role,chat_id,user_id) values (?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.created_by, c1_0.name, c1_0.type from chats c1_0 join chat_participants p1_0 on c1_0.id=p1_0.chat_id where p1_0.user_id=?

testcase.name: chatRepository_FindDialogBetweenUsers_ShouldReturnDialog
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.chat_id, c1_0.user_id, c1_0.joined_at, c1_0.role from chat_participants c1_0 where ( c1_0.chat_id,c1_0.user_id ) in ((?,?)) Hibernate: insert into chats (created_at,created_by,name,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chat_participants (joined_at,role,chat_id,user_id) values (?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chat_participants (joined_at,role,chat_id,user_id) values (?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chat_participants (joined_at,role,chat_id,user_id) values (?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chats (created_at,created_by,name,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chat_participants (joined_at,role,chat_id,user_id) values (?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into chat_participants (joined_at,role,chat_id,user_id) values (?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.created_by, c1_0.name, c1_0.type from chats c1_0 join chat_participants p1_0 on c1_0.id=p1_0.chat_id where c1_0.type='DIALOG' and p1_0.user_id in (?,?) group by c1_0.id, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.created_by, c1_0.name, c1_0.type having count(*)=2
